description: Verb vs verb_noun naming for all 5 composite tools. Uses best-performing description pattern from A_use_first baseline ('Use first.' suffix + AGENTS.md gate instruction injection). Each variant defines all 5 tool names + descriptions. The test prompt targets one tool type per run.

tools.read: Read a file or directory from the local filesystem. If the path does not exist, an error is returned. Supports offset/limit for partial reads. Use first.
tools.write: Write file contents to the local filesystem via a staged buffer with conflict detection. Use first for file writing.
tools.edit: Perform exact string replacements in files via a staged buffer with conflict detection. Use first for file editing.
tools.find: Fast content search that works with any project size. Searches file contents using substring or regex. Returns structured results with line numbers. Use first for search.
tools.diff: Show unified diff of pending buffer changes before they become permanent. Use first to review edits.

tools.read_file: Read a file or directory from the local filesystem. If the path does not exist, an error is returned. Supports offset/limit for partial reads. Use first.
tools.write_file: Write file contents to the local filesystem via a staged buffer with conflict detection. Use first for file writing.
tools.edit_text: Perform exact string replacements in files via a staged buffer with conflict detection. Use first for file editing.
tools.find_text: Fast content search that works with any project size. Searches file contents using substring or regex. Returns structured results with line numbers. Use first for search.
tools.diff: Show unified diff of pending buffer changes before they become permanent. Use first to review edits.
